name: Format: draft new NDA in the sample's structure
instruction: Draft a mutual NDA between [PARTY A] and [PARTY B] following this structure.
notes: Should mirror headings/numbering, NOT reuse Acme/Globex/Delaware facts.

name: Exact: reframe with the user's data
instruction: Draft this NDA for Initech Inc. and Hooli Inc., effective March 1, 2026, governed by California law, with a 3-year term.
notes: Should follow the structure and fill the slots with the supplied data.

name: Inspiration: tone-only guidance on an edit
selectionText: The Receiving Party shall not disclose Confidential Information to any third party.
notes: Edit mode; reference used for tone only.
